overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a neon-lit cyberpunk plaza at night. The scene features futuristic architecture, holographic advertisements, vending machines, and NPCs populating a wet, reflective pedestrian market area with Japanese signage.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow covered entrance corridor with glass walls and a large digital billboard visible ahead. The corridor opens up toward a neon-lit plaza in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with neon signage and seating areas

large white patio umbrella over seating
large potted tree in black planter

segments.scene_description: Entering the main open plaza with a prominent blue neon vacancy sign overhead. The area features cyan illuminated benches, white umbrellas over seating, and scattered pedestrians. The wet floor reflects the vibrant neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: food bar area with counter and green stools

circles around food bar and continues forward

segments.scene_description: Approaching a food bar with bright green stools where a vendor serves food to a seated customer. The camera circles the area, revealing arcade machines in the background while the vacancy sign remains visible overhead.

segments.scene_description: Moving through the rear section of the plaza past a row of brightly colored vending machines. The Machat Sushi sign becomes visible on the left while the arcade machines remain prominent on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor seating area with umbrellas and sushi restaurant

agents.ego_description: walking through outdoor seating area toward plaza exit

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in beige outfit walking toward camera

entered.detail: tables and red chairs under white umbrellas

segments.scene_description: Walking through the outdoor seating area with white umbrellas and red chairs near the Machat Sushi restaurant. A pedestrian approaches from the opposite direction as the camera moves toward the plaza exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined glass corridor into a sprawling, neon-drenched cyberpunk plaza. It begins by moving through a narrow covered entrance with glass walls, heading toward a large digital billboard that signals the opening of the space. As the camera emerges into the main plaza, the environment expands to reveal a wet, reflective ground mirroring a prominent blue vacancy sign and cyan illuminated benches under white umbrellas. The scene then shifts toward a food bar with bright green stools where a vendor serves a customer, before circling the area to reveal arcade machines in the background.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a narrow corridor of neon vending machines into an open-air dining plaza. It begins by gliding past a row of brightly colored vending machines, with arcade cabinets lining the right side as the Machat Sushi sign emerges on the left. As the camera advances, the enclosed feeling of the vending area gives way to an outdoor seating space filled with white umbrellas and red chairs. The scene then shifts toward the plaza exit, passing a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction while the restaurant's facade looms closer. Finally, the movement carries the viewer out of the dining area and toward the open expanse of the city.
